profile.bio: I'm always open to learning, collaborating, and joining enthusiastic teams for hackathons or real-world projects. Let's connect and build something meaningful together!

about.heading: Software Engineer With AI skills | AI Explorer | Problem Solver | Lifelong Learner
about.aboutme:
I’m a Software Engineer with 2 years of industry experience, passionate about building scalable applications that combine full-stack development with AI-driven solutions. I enjoy turning ideas into reliable systems that solve real-world problems.
 Previously, I worked on developing and maintaining a full-stack e-commerce platform using Spring Boot, React.js, and MySQL, where I built secure REST APIs, improved transaction workflows, implemented JWT-based authentication, and enhanced responsive user interfaces. This experience strengthened my skills in backend architecture, API development, application security, and scalable system design. 
 I value clean, maintainable code and clear system design, and I’m particularly interested in building intelligent, scalable applications that integrate AI with modern web technologies.

projects.title: Full-Stack SaaS Receipt Processing Platform
projects.description: Automates receipt processing through AI OCR and event-driven workflows, reducing manual effort while delivering secure authentication and seamless subscription management.

projects.title: AI Stock Prediction System (Multi-Agent Architecture)
projects.description: Google ADK Multi-agent AI system for parallel stock analysis, real time orchestration, and explainable financial predictions.

projects.title: Multi-PDF RAG Question-Answering Bot
projects.description: AI-powered Retrieval Augmented Generation system that allows users to upload multiple PDFs and ask questions across documents with source attribution.
